g.title: Hardware component or trap handler managing address translation failures.

g.text: Intel x86-64 Memory Management - Frame Eviction Lifecycle

ul.li: PTE_INVALID: Bit 0 must be cleared before PFN is returned to caller to prevent stale access.
ATOMICITY: The replacement engine state (Clock hand position/LRU list) must be updated immediately after selection.
TLB_FLUSH: A global or process-specific TLB shootdown (invlpg) is required across all cores after Step 11.
ZERO_FILL: Frame scrubbing (Step 12) is mandatory to prevent cross-process info leakage.

g.title: Hardware component or trap handler managing address translation failures.
